raw_text:
CloudWeave Systems // Junior Site Reliability Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) | Full-time | $85,000 - $110,000 USD annually

Reliable infrastructure that scales with your ambitions

>> ABOUT

CloudWeave Systems is a mid-stage SaaS infrastructure platform that helps engineering teams
build, deploy, and operate resilient cloud applications. Founded in 2019, we focus on

providing developer-friendly tools for containerized workloads and observability at scale.
Our mission is to reduce MTTR and improve system reliability for companies of all sizes.

>> SUMMARY

CloudWeave Systems is seeking a Junior Site Reliability Engineer to join our Platform
Reliability team. In this role, you'll work alongside experienced SREs to build and

maintain the infrastructure that powers our platform. You'll gain hands-on experience with
containerization, monitoring, and incident response while contributing to the reliability

of systems serving thousands of customers. This is an excellent opportunity for early-
career engineers passionate about systems reliability and operational excellence.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Assist in designing, implementing, and maintaining Kubernetes clusters that host our
core services

- Contribute to monitoring and alerting setup using Prometheus and Grafana, including
creating meaningful dashboards and alerts based on SLOs/SLIs

- Participate in on-call rotations (starting with shadowing shifts) and respond to
production incidents with guidance from senior team members

- Write automation scripts and operational tooling in Go or Python to reduce manual
operational toil

- Help implement distributed tracing using tools like Jaeger or Datadog to improve
observability and debugging capabilities

- Document runbooks and operational procedures to improve team knowledge and incident
response efficiency

- Collaborate with platform and application teams to identify reliability improvements
and optimize system performance

- Learn SRE practices including SLO/SLI definition, error budgets, and blameless post-
mortems through team mentorship

>> MUST HAVE

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent
professional experience)

- Strong foundational knowledge of Linux/Unix systems administration and networking
concepts

- Familiarity with containerization concepts and Docker basics
- Experience with or willingness to quickly learn at least one programming language (Go,

Python, or similar)
- Understanding of observability fundamentals: metrics, logs, and traces

 - Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting mindset with attention to detail

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Hands-on experience with Kubernetes or container orchestration platforms
- Prior experience with monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or similar

- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and Infrastructure-as-Code tools
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation

>> STACK

Kubernetes / Docker / Prometheus / Grafana / Go / Python / Jaeger (Distributed Tracing) /

Linux/Unix / Git / Terraform

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance with 90% company coverage
- 401(k) matching program (up to 4% of salary)

- Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 15 days encouraged per year
- Professional development budget of $2,500 annually for conferences, courses, and

certifications
- Mentorship from experienced SREs and access to internal tech talks and learning

sessions
- Flexible work arrangement with fully remote options after 90-day onboarding period

- Free lunch stipend ($15/day) and wellness reimbursement ($100/month)
- Collaborative team culture with regular team outings and community events

>> APPLY

Submit your resume, a cover letter, and links to any relevant GitHub projects or portfolio
work to careers@cloudweave.io with the subject line 'Junior SRE Application'. We review

applications on a rolling basis and will contact selected candidates within 5-7 business
days to schedule an initial screening call.
